report_name: ESA Hosts Industry Workshop to Develop Standardized Cybersecurity for Space Systems

identities.name: European Space Agency (ESA)
identities.description: Spearheading an initiative to develop standardized, reusable cybersecurity products for European space systems to enhance resilience against cyber threats and ensure compliance with new regulations like the EU Space Act.

identities.name: European Space Industry
identities.description: A broad group of stakeholders, including prime contractors and SMEs, who will be the primary consumers of the new standardized cybersecurity products developed under the ESA's General Support Technology Programme (GSTP).

identities.name: EU Member States
identities.description: National governments with a vested interest in securing their critical space infrastructure and ensuring their national industries are compliant with emerging regulations such as the EU Space Act.
